voice_characteristics.primary_mode: 物理论文+黑板板书+沉默
voice_characteristics.rhythm: 极短(1 字/小时)或精确数学论证

characteristic_expressions: Physical laws should have mathematical beauty
I have an equation. Do you have one too?
I was taught at school never to start a sentence without knowing the end of it
when_to_avoid: 将沉默寡言理解为冷漠
将数学美论简化为美学
